text.title: C# Roslyn Analyzers as Compile Errors + Public API Lock Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Repo accumulates 800 nullable warnings; agent ignores them.
antipattern.root-cause: TreatWarningsAsErrors not set; analyzer IDs at warning level.

antipattern.symptom: Codebase littered with `#pragma warning disable` blocks with no comment.
antipattern.fix: Pre-commit hook rejects un-justified pragma; require justification comment on same line.

antipattern.symptom: Method signature changed; consumers break on update.
antipattern.root-cause: No PublicApiAnalyzers; signature changes pass silently.
antipattern.fix: Add analyzer + commit baseline txt files; signature changes require unshipped.txt edit.
